name: waterlooworks-jobs
description: WaterlooWorks job search automation skills for student applications.

interface.shortDescription: Scrape, write, upload, and submit WaterlooWorks applications.
interface.longDescription: WaterlooWorks Jobs packages skills for students to scrape job descriptions, draft tailored cover letters, upload documents, restore login sessions, and apply to Full-Cycle Service jobs across work terms.
defaultPrompt: Apply to a WaterlooWorks job ID.
